subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath adorned himself with the ornament of love for the All-Merciful and hath turned towards Him when the servants turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن تزین بطراز محبه الرحمن و اقبل الیه اذ اعرض عنه العباد ان
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @call to action, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
